guidelines: Make plan comparison easy with aligned features
Include a toggle for monthly/annual billing
Add social proof or guarantees near the CTA
colorGuidance: Highlight the recommended plan with brand accent color or elevation
Use subtle background differences to distinguish plans
Green checkmarks for included features, gray for excluded
spacingGuidance: 32px internal padding for each pricing card
commonMistakes: Too many plans (more than 4) causing decision paralysis
Hidden fees or unclear feature differences
CTA button not prominent on the recommended plan
Missing enterprise or custom plan option
